note_codes.g: Geological materials are known in which the element has an isotopic composition outside the limits for normal material.
note_codes.m: Modified isotopic compositions may be found in commercially available material because the material has been subjected to an undisclosed or inadvertent isotopic fractionation.
note_codes.r: Range in isotopic composition of normal terrestrial material prevents a more precise standard atomic weight being given.

conventions.relative_atomic_mass: Ar of isotope, scaled to 12C = 12. {value, uncertainty?, estimated?}; uncertainty is the parenthesised digits referred to the last digits of value; estimated=true when source carried a trailing '#'.
conventions.isotopic_composition: Mole fraction of the isotope in normal materials, same {value, uncertainty?} shape; null if not given.
conventions.notes: Array of single-letter codes; see note_codes.
